positive: A vibrant, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring abstract representations of nature: flowing river lines, stylized mountain peaks, and intricate starbursts, composed within a bold, continuous border. The palette is tropical and electric, utilizing deep turquoise, vibrant coral pink, electric lime green, and saturated indigo against an off-white background. The style is modern mid-century geometric pop art, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Strong, clean silhouettes, high contrast, and perfect radial symmetry. Minimal shading, maximal pattern density.
